sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58332" key="koilitikh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοιλῑτική</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νόσος</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, disease <sense id="n58332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the bowels,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.161</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
